preserving.name: en paraphrase keeps claim/numbers/entities
preserving.original: The 2024 report shows revenue grew because the new pricing model attracted 30 enterprise customers.
preserving.rewrite: Revenue grew in the 2024 report, driven by the new pricing model that brought in 30 enterprise customers.

preserving.name: en de-puffed marketing keeps the fact
preserving.original: We are thrilled to announce that our revolutionary platform now supports 12 languages and 3 export formats.
preserving.rewrite: The platform now supports 12 languages and 3 export formats.

preserving.name: ko paraphrase keeps claim/numbers
preserving.original: 2024년 보고서에 따르면 새 가격 정책이 기업 고객 30곳을 유치해 매출이 늘었다.
preserving.rewrite: 보고서를 보면 새 가격 정책 덕분에 기업 고객 30곳이 들어와 2024년 매출이 늘었다.

broken.name: en dropped entities + numbers + truncation
broken.original: The 2024 report shows revenue grew because the new pricing model attracted 30 enterprise customers in Berlin and Tokyo.
broken.rewrite: Things generally improved over the period.

broken.name: en polarity inversion
broken.original: The migration is not safe and should never run without a backup, and it cannot be reverted.
broken.rewrite: The migration is safe and should always run, and it can be reverted.

broken.name: en severe truncation
broken.original: Alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon phi chi psi omega.
